things.name: Al-Balad Historic District
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage old city with coral-stone tower houses and mashrabiya wooden latticework

things.name: King Fahd Fountain
things.description: World's tallest fountain at 312m shooting water into the Red Sea - spectacular at night

things.name: Red Sea Snorkelling & Diving
things.description: World-class Red Sea coral reefs with incredible marine biodiversity just offshore

things.name: Corniche Promenade
things.description: 30km seafront promenade along the Red Sea with parks, sculptures and the famous globe

things.name: Floating Mosque (Al-Rahma)
things.description: Unique mosque built on stilts over the Red Sea, appearing to float at high tide

things.name: Al-Shallal Theme Park
things.description: Amusement and water park on the Red Sea coast

things.name: Souq Al-Alawi
things.description: Traditional market in Al-Balad selling gold, spices, incense and authentic Saudi goods

things.name: Fakieh Aquarium
things.description: Marine life of the Red Sea with dolphin shows and the largest shark tank in the region

things.name: King Abdulaziz International Stadium
things.description: Distinctive 62,000-seat football stadium with an innovative translucent polymer roof

things.name: Taif Rose Festival
things.description: Day trip to the cool mountain city famous for its rose distilleries and honey
